subject: HireOS AI interview invitation for Backend Engineer
body_text:
Hi Rhea Notify,

You have been invited to the HireOS AI interview flow for the Backend Engineer role.

Candidate interview link: http://localhost:3000/interview/854aaa80-ab04-4e37-8eae-4472a3962079
Google Calendar event draft: https://calendar.google.com/calendar/render?action=TEMPLATE&text=HireOS%20AI%20interview%20-%20Backend%20Engineer&details=Candidate%20portal%20link%3A%20http%3A%2F%2Flocalhost%3A3000%2Finterview%2F854aaa80-ab04-4e37-8eae-4472a3962079%0A%0ARecruiter%20note%3A%20AI-generated%20interview%20scores%20are%20decision-support%20signals%20and%20should%20be%20reviewed%20by%20a%20human%20recruiter.&add=rhea%40example.com
The recruiter can save that event and send the calendar invite to you.

Please reply if you need a different time or accommodation.

Best,
HireOS AI Recruiting
